llm_verdict.message:
I am unable to complete the remediation due to a password expiration issue on the system. The error message indicates that the password has expired and requires immediate change, but there is no TTY available to perform the password change.

To resolve this issue, you will need to:
1. Access the system with physical console access or through a method that provides a TTY
2. Update the password using the passwd command
3. Once the password is updated, I can proceed with the remediation

The remediation would have set the fail_interval parameter to 900 seconds in the PAM configuration to meet the security requirement. Please resolve the password expiration issue and I'll be able to complete the remediation.
